notes: Basic scaffold exists but Mario's gravity/platform collision is broken (y-position logic inverted relative to platform coordinates), making the game nearly unplayable; barrels don't roll down inclined girders, ladders don't reliably work, and the visual layout bears little resemblance to the original Donkey Kong arcade structure.
Severe collision detection bugs cause all entities to rapidly jitter up and down, and barrels fail to zig-zag down the platforms.

Basic movement and hazards exist, but core Donkey Kong progression is incomplete/broken (no proper stage clear flow, simplistic/non-sloped level design, weak enemy logic, and death/stage-complete states do not meaningfully resolve), so this is only a loose approximation rather than a solid playable Donkey Kong build.
